acceptance_criteria.text: A reranking step can be toggled on the vector-RAG baseline.
Reranking measurably improves precision@k on a fixture set when enabled.
covered_by: test_reranking_improves_precision_at_k_over_baseline (the core acceptance assertion, real numbers in self-consistency.json)

acceptance_criteria.text: pytest agents/eval/test_vector_rag_rerank.py: compare precision@k reranking on vs. off on a fixture set.
Reuse 5.2.1's baseline (chunker + OllamaEmbeddingClient + VectorRagIndex), not reimplement retrieval.
covered_by: vector_rag_rerank.py imports retrieve_documents/VectorRagIndex/OllamaEmbeddingClient from vector_rag.py, defines no chunking/embedding/cosine-similarity logic of its own

acceptance_criteria.text: No unjustified new heavy ML dependency; Ollama-only; no paid API; no .env.

explicit_non_fabrication_gate: If the live-local reranking-improves-precision test does not pass on first honest attempt, the fixture corpus/query is redesigned (not the assertion loosened or the result asserted without running) until a genuine discriminating case is found, per dispatch instruction. Actual iteration log recorded in self-consistency.json.
